title: Clients
subtitle: Manage income sources and set default categories
noClientsDescription: Clients are automatically detected when you sync bank transactions. You can also create clients manually or from existing income transactions.

form.newDescription: Create a new client to organize your income.
form.name: Name
form.taxIdDescription: For invoice matching and tax purposes.
form.defaultCategoryDescription: New income from this client will use this category.
form.deleteHasIncomes: This client has {count, plural, one {# linked income} other {# linked incomes}}.
form.deleteReassign: You must reassign them before deleting, or merge this client with another.
form.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete {name}. This action cannot be undone.

merge.title: Merge {count} Clients
merge.description: Select which client to keep. All income from the other clients will be reassigned to this client, and the others will be deleted.
merge.mergeDescription: This will merge {mergeCount, plural, one {# client} other {# clients}} and reassign {incomeCount, plural, one {# income} other {# incomes}} to the selected client.

backfill.allAssigned: All income transactions already have clients assigned.
backfill.createdCount: Created {count, plural, one {# new client} other {# new clients}}
backfill.linked: linked {count, plural, one {# income} other {# incomes}}
